intended_use: InferRead Lung CT.AI is comprised of computer assisted reading tools designed to aid the radiologist in the detection of pulmonary nodules during the review of CT examinations of the chest on an asymp
intended_use_full: InferRead Lung CT.AI is comprised of computer assisted reading tools designed to aid the radiologist in the detection of pulmonary nodules during the review of CT examinations of the chest on an asymptomatic population. InferRead Lung CT.AI requires that both lungs be in the field of view. InferRead Lung CT.AI provides adjunctive information and is not intended to be used without the original CT series.
target_condition: Pulmonary nodules (solid, sub-solid, and ground-glass nodules ≥4mm)
ground_truth: Board-certified radiologist interpretation in pivotal reader study; clinical data and phantom data for standalone testing
other_metrics: Localization receiver operating characteristic (LROC) area under curve (AUC) aided - unaided: 0.073 (95% CI: 0.020, 0.125); Reading time reduction: -23 seconds (95% CI: -42, -3); Device demonstrated similar nodule detection sensitivity and false positives per scan compared to predicate device.
